name: Team Yang
subject: Straight from the source
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Andrew has a message for you!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3795%2E377263%2Eo_3xz_) Yang Gang --

The Yang Gang always hits its goals.

Andrew knows it, and we do too -- which is why he made this short video just for you: [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18044?t=5&akid=3795%2E377263%2Eo_3xz_) We’re approaching another deadline, but this time we’re not sure we can make it happen.

We are so close, and you’re the only one who can push us over the edge and help us meet our $2 million goal by the end of November.

[Rush $10 or more right now to stand with Andrew and help meet our end-of-month target.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18044?t=7&akid=3795%2E377263%2Eo_3xz_)

It’s crunch time -- and we’re counting on you. Every dollar matters. Every donation matters.

Thank you,

Team Yang | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18044?t=6&akid=3795%2E377263%2Eo_3xz_)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3795%2E377263%2Eo_3xz_) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3795%2E377263%2Eo_3xz_) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Cory Booker
subject: Please tell me you're able to go offline soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I'm so grateful for this team.
Friend,
I truly hope you're able to log off and spend time with your family and loved ones soon -- that's what I plan on doing shortly.
But before we all go offline, I want to make sure you know how thankful I am for this team. So many of you have stepped up to build this campaign since the last debate, and your support means the world to me.
My team won't let me forget to mention that we still need to qualify for the next debate, and that's why we set a goal to raise $1.5 million by Saturday.
[**I 'm reaching out one last time ahead of your holiday plans to ask you -- if you believe in our message of unity and courageous empathy -- to make a donation to this effort.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_CB_20191127-fr-CB-grateful-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
I hope your next few days are filled with love, joy, and a profound sense of gratitude. I know mine will be.
Thanks,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_CB_20191127-fr-CB-grateful-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd3/5fca0d19/796d3e76/291ca7b4/759359742/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd3/5fca0d19/796d3e76/291ca7b3/759359742/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd3/5fca0d19/796d3e76/291ca7b2/759359742/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd3/5fca0d19/796d3e76/291ca7b1/759359742/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd3/5fca0d19/796d3e76/291ca7b0/759359742/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd3/5fca0d19/796d3e76/291ca7b4/759359742/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: POLITICAL HIT JOB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhutra-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, **These impeachment hearings are a political hit job.** This is just another sad attempt from the Democrats to deny the results of the 2016 election and to prevent any work from actually being done in Washington.**** **Americans elected President Trump,** not the Democrats who will not cease this baseless witch hunt. This has gone on for far too long. **[WE MUST STOP THE IMPEACHMENT HOAX.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhutra-kujulhlke-j/)** President trump has kept his promises to the American people and to Hoosiers, despite every effort from the left. **The past three years they have fought the president at every turn, instead of actually doing their jobs.** **Tell the Do Nothing Democrats it’s time to get back to work and end this political sham.** We are fighting to protect the President in D.C. and we need your support. [**Can we count on you in this fight?**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhutra-kujulhlke-t/) Through their baseless accusations, Democrats have managed to turn impeachment into biased, political warfare. **[Help us end this ridiculous circus once and for all.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhutra-kujulhlke-i/)** As always, thank you for your continued support, Senator Mike Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhutra-kujulhlke-d/) |
---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: qualifying threshold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I need your help.
The DNC requires 200,000 unique donors to qualify for the December debate stage. [We're nearly there -- we need less than 6,000 more.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e6/3eb3e2fc/6857af19/744d5c82/2778050370/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Wersquore+nearly+there++we+need+less+tha&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all") We also need to reach the polling requirements. We're making a huge push to make sure we can get our ads out, raise the profile of the campaign, and share my vision for the future of our country. [With little time remaining, will you rush in $15 to help fund our push and reach the requirements before the December deadline?](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e6/3eb3e2fc/6857af19/744d5c81/2778050370/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+With+little+time+remaining+will+you+rush&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Thank you,
Julian

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e6/3eb3e2fc/6857af19/744d5c8d/2778050370/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e6/3eb3e2fc/6857af19/744d5c8c/2778050370/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e6/3eb3e2fc/6857af19/744d5c8b/2778050370/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Susan (Michael's wife)
subject: last chance to sign Michael's card!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Evening Team Bennet!

I have a special request.

In addition to Thanksgiving, tomorrow is Michael's birthday, and I'd like to surprise him with a card signed by as many grateful supporters as possible!

I'm planning to show him tomorrow morning so if you haven't signed on, now's the perfect time.

[Friend: can you add your name? You can even write a short birthday message for Michael!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba985/134673f2/9c6bb5b/6997a517/2380482537/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2019-birthday-card?source=EM_PET_B3_112719_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba985/134673f2/9c6bb5b/6997a517/2380482537/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2019-birthday-card?source=EM_PET_B3_112719_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
Michael has been traveling across the country talking to voters about issues that affect all of us every day. He's working hard to present his unifying vision to ensure our country is building more opportunity for the next generation.

I want to show him just how much it means to you to have someone like Michael in your corner, fighting for real change on issues that matter most.

[All you have to do is click here to add your name to our card before midnight!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba985/134673f2/9c6bb5b/6997a517/2380482537/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2019-birthday-card?source=EM_PET_B3_112719_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

On his Thanksgiving birthday, Michael will be so thankful to see your name, so don't wait! Sign his card now!

Gratefully,

Susan Daggett

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
We have been given so much. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8d5acb4a637d/happy-thanksgiving?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| |
# Some perspective for this joyous time of Thanksgiving...
Let us all remember that love and grace are God’s gifts as we gather this Thanksgiving.

Despite the political rancor of the day, we have so much for which to be thankful and so much on which we can all agree.
---
|
---
| Personally, I am so thankful to live in the freest country in the world, with the Constitutional protections we’ve been given.

Protections that can’t be taken away by the stroke of a pen.

But, one of the things I’m most thankful for today is you.

Your support has been such a source of encouragement as my campaign has gotten underway this fall.

Helping to spread the word about my campaign...

The generous financial support that keeps us going...

And, especially the prayers of God’s people that continue to sustain me during the long, difficult days.

The battle for our country, and my campaign will continue.

But today, let us rest, enjoy the company of family and friends, and be thankful for all we have been given.

After all, this is what it’s all about – and I’m so happy to take some time off and just focus on my family today.

Have a very Happy Thanksgiving.

God bless you. God bless Texas. God bless America.

Kathleen Wall
---
|
---

Despite the political rancor of the day, we have so much for which to be thankful and so much on which we can all agree. | | Personally, I am so thankful to live in the freest country in the world, with the Constitutional protections we’ve been given. Protections that can’t be taken away by the stroke of a pen. But, one of the things I’m most thankful for today is you. Your support has been such a source of encouragement as my campaign has gotten underway this fall. Helping to spread the word about my campaign... The generous financial support that keeps us going... And, especially the prayers of God’s people that continue to sustain me during the long, difficult days. The battle for our country, and my campaign will continue. But today, let us rest, enjoy the company of family and friends, and be thankful for all we have been given. After all, this is what it’s all about – and I’m so happy to take some time off and just focus on my family today. Have a very Happy Thanksgiving. God bless you. God bless Texas. God bless America. Kathleen Wall | | "Contribute" | | | | | | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487 You can or .

name: Tina Smith
subject: running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I know your time is valuable, especially with the holiday tomorrow, so I'm going to keep this message short and sweet. Thank you in advance for taking the time to read it.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191127-sweet?refcode=em191127-sweet&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

I know your time is valuable, especially with the holiday tomorrow, so I'm going to keep this message short and sweet. Thank you in advance for taking the time to read it.

You may not know this, but the majority of contributions to my re-election campaign come from folks like you giving whatever they can afford because they want to make a difference in this election. The average donation to one of these messages tends to be in the ballpark of $28 or so.

As it stands, we're still just a bit behind for November. Between defending our progressive values in Washington and traveling all across the state talking to Minnesotans, I just haven't had a lot of time to fundraise. So, I'm turning to you for a helping hand:

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Will Michael Bloomberg be Our Next President?
body:
Will Bloomberg be our next president? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [So, Any Chance Michael Bloomberg's Going to be Our Next President?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Michael Bloomberg is a very successful businessman, and later served three consecutive terms as Mayor of New York City. Most would argue that he had a pretty successful run at both, although he has now refuted, and apologized for, some of his signature policies, like stop and frisk. Now he wants to be our president. This week I write about Bloomberg's chances of winning and how he will spend a fortune trying. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [So How's the Impeachment Going?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats impeachment process is a flawed and biased charade. In this week's blog, I discuss how the impeachment proceedings are going and how they differ from the last successful presidential impeachment, Bill Clinton in 1998. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Remembering My Mom](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-u/)
My mom, Doris Leona Tilley Chabot, passed away a week ago today, at the age of 95. In this week's blog, I remember my Mom, a victory belle from the greatest generation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Camp David](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-n/)
This past weekend I was humbled to be a guest at Camp David. Steeped in mystery, this decades old presidential retreat has an amazing history. In this week's blog, I write about how a place known as Shangri-La became Camp David, and you won't want to miss what I found written in a book in my cabin! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdktoyd-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Peter Khalil
subject: There is a voter...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | ...who makes all the difference.
---
---
**—**
There is a voter out there.

There is a voter out there who doesn't care about what the parties say or do.

There is a voter out there who doesn't want to skip work to come to our vapid town halls or our awkward photo-op events.

There is a voter out there scared of losing his job or turning 26.

There is a voter out there who can't pay for school.

There is a voter out there who has three jobs.

There is a voter out there who's scared for his future.

There is a voter out there who fears for his kids at school.

There is a voter out there taking care of his dying dad.

There is a voter out there who wants to work, but can't.

There is a voter out there who agrees with more than one of us.

There is a voter out there who is afraid to say what he thinks.

There is a voter out there who doesn't read the newspaper, but still cares enough to have an opinion, who doesn't know but knows there's something wrong.

There is a voter out there who isn't on Twitter and doesn't care about Bernie or Elizabeth or Joe.

There is a voter out there who works, comes home, and just wants to be left alone, just wants some precious time with family, just wants to live a quiet life.

There is a voter out there who doesn't care but cares enough.

There is a voter out there we never see.

That is the voter who makes the difference.
Help us reach that voter. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: thankful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, I want to take a quick minute and wish you and your family a happy Thanksgiving. I hope you can join me in reflecting on a few things we are thankful for this year.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=53A64A1A714)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,

I want to take a quick minute and wish you and your family a happy Thanksgiving. I hope you can join me in reflecting on a few things we are thankful for this year.

I’m thankful for God's love and protection, for the peace and prosperity we enjoy, and the progress we’ve made seeing peace continue to spread around the world.

I'm thankful for friends, family, neighbors, and loved ones. The bonds of community help make our nation great.

I’m thankful for our brave veterans and our active duty service members who keep us free and secure. So many are away from their homes and families this Thanksgiving. Please especially keep them in your prayers.

I’m thankful for our doctors, nurses, police officers, firefighters, border patrol, public safety officials and all those working to help keep us healthy and safe.

I’m thankful for so many of our elected leaders and our President, who are helping small businesses thrive, working to create jobs, grow our economy, and protect life and liberty.

And I am thankful for you. For all you do, for your support and your strength.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving!

Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Giving thanks to my GOP in-laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin For Congress
body:
Hey there,
I'm updating you from sunny Florida, where my husband Dave and I are celebrating Thanksgiving with the Moore side of the family. Like many of you, we’re taking today to think about the many things we have to be thankful for.
After nearly a year in Congress, I’m especially thankful this year for my family, especially my in-laws who are busy hosting in the next room. Although we may not agree on every political issue, I’ve been so very fortunate to have their support throughout my campaign and now my first term in Congress. Back in 2017, when I told my mother in-law I was running (as a Democrat!) she wasted no time in putting together an event to introduce me to all of her friends, even though she was a life-long Republican. Apparently, in these polarized times, it was interesting enough that the Wall Street Journal wrote a little article [https://www.wsj.com/articles/whos-reaching-across-the-political-aisle-mom-and-dad-1520351251] about candidates running with family of a different political persuasion. My mother-in-law’s enthusiasm touched me then, and it continues to touch me now. That first event, which took place just after Thanksgiving in 2017, included ladies across the political spectrum -- and it gave me hope that no matter our differences, we all share common values and a shared love of our country.

Fast forward to today, and my in-laws have supported me every step of the way. They were in Washington when I was sworn in, they call and post about our weekly activities, and, most importantly, they provide moral support and encouragement to Dave and I every single day. So today, when so many of us are giving thanks, I wanted to make a special effort to thank my family and all those who support Dave and I. We simply couldn’t do it without you.
So: from my family to yours, wishing you the happiest and healthiest of Thanksgivings!
Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress/] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]
Paid for by Elissa Slotkin For Congress
P.O. Box 244
Holly, MI 48442
United States

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jdhpwE6aAYzBHLwfqd0BOF460cdh4AFsFzYB8IfxmbQ=/iQ3Olhjb_VqY3s8r9mD7RI6aLD-4oVUzRJLnvsFgbh0=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191128email) Team, Today, as friends and families across the nation come together in warmth and thanksgiving, I wanted to send you a personal note to let you know how grateful I am to have your support. Running for Congress has been the journey of a lifetime. But it's only possible because of supporters like you, and the rest of Team Sri \-- from our diligent volunteers, to our grassroots donors, and of course our brilliant staff. **Your support is incredibly humbling and I thank you for investing in this movement and working every day to help us flip TX-22 blue.** I also want to pause to send a special acknowledgment to our brave men and women in the military, foreign service, and everybody else who is serving our country abroad right now. After spending almost 15 years overseas, I know how hard it is to be thousands of miles away from your loved ones during the holidays. But please know that there are people back here who love you and respect the job you are doing taking care of our country -- we thank you for your service. No matter where you are or how you celebrate, I hope your day is filled with joy, gratitude, and delicious food -- Happy Thanksgiving! -Sri Preston Kulkarni

clean_body: Team, Today, as friends and families across the nation come together in warmth and thanksgiving, I wanted to send you a personal note to let you know how grateful I am to have your support. Running for Congress has been the journey of a lifetime. But it's only possible because of supporters like you, and the rest of Team Sri \-- from our diligent volunteers, to our grassroots donors, and of course our brilliant staff. Your support is incredibly humbling and I thank you for investing in this movement and working every day to help us flip TX-22 blue. I also want to pause to send a special acknowledgment to our brave men and women in the military, foreign service, and everybody else who is serving our country abroad right now. After spending almost 15 years overseas, I know how hard it is to be thousands of miles away from your loved ones during the holidays. But please know that there are people back here who love you and respect the job you are doing taking care of our country -- we thank you for your service. No matter where you are or how you celebrate, I hope your day is filled with joy, gratitude, and delicious food -- Happy Thanksgiving! -Sri Preston Kulkarni | | STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = = | Paid for by Sri for Congress. Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugar Land TX 77478 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to longer receive emails from us, please =.

name: Christina Finello
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, I know that the holidays can be a challenging time for a lot of people, so I wanted to reach out to you to let you know that I am so grateful that you are here and a member of this team. When I decided to run for Congress, I took a leap of faith. My background in public service and forensic psychology has given me a unique perspective that I hope to bring to DC, and I knew I would do a better job of representing our district than our current representative does. But I don’t come from a lot of money or have a network of wealthy friends, so taking on an incumbent Republican backed by powerful interests has proven to be challenging. That’s why YOU are so important to me. From donating, volunteering, and sharing news about my race on social media to opening an email to boost our open rates on this campaign, every little thing you’ve done to help has mattered. (And I know, I write A LOT. So thanks for reading them!) This next year will be hard, but I’m ready to work to win this. Thank you for being someone I can count on. Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours! Christina, Todd, Katie, and Nora | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12314625/126546960/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191128&refcode2=pIby1NtvhuDtdu7qYmew&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2MwZDAzYy1mODExLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O5SpVTIpz_eUG_65rtkzyTVlssfeqJ5fJDKn4NgHXEU=)**

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Something to be Thankful For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkyiuil-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, It’s almost Thanksgiving, which means for most Americans we will finally have a break from the non-stop sham impeachment process playing out in Washington. But before you get in a heated debate with your relatives about the President, let’s take a moment to recap what he’s done for the American people.
# A Historic Economic Boom
* Record GDP growth and a booming stock market
* Job openings out-number the unemployed for the first time on record
* Unemployment has fallen well below 4%, including the lowest African American unemployment rate on record

# Unleashing American Energy
* America is the largest crude oil producer in the world again
* Ending President Obama’s costly war on coal
* Approved the Key Stone pipeline and numerous other major energy producing projects

# Keeping America Safe
* Mobilizing the entire federal government to combat the opioid crisis
* Standing firmly with law enforcement in this country
* Upholding the rule of law and securing our borders

# Restoring American Leadership
* Securing the largest military pay raise in nearly a decade
* Liberated ISIS territory and stood firm against our enemies
* Renegotiating trade deals and alliances to secure American interests

**President Trump has not let the sham impeachment process stop him from delivering for the American people.** Together, we can all fight to keep American great again in 2020. [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkyiuil-kujulhlke-j/) |
---|---|---

subject: Gobble gobble! 🦃🍂

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12319118/126583230/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThkZjVlMi0wNDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3sd1PAct2PRySSL-oWOdTbrXJxAVwTzFqFP51qhyTM=&emci=bd8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=be8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, Today is a wonderful holiday to spend time with loved ones and share gratitude for the precious things in life. For those of you who I have met, for those I have the honor of having earned your support, please accept my appreciation, on behalf of my family and this campaign. We are on the cusp of a great political victory in 2020 here in the Texas 10th, and we owe that to the wonderful synchronicity of movements and individuals who share this territory. I want to take a couple minutes to put pen to paper, to recognize how we’ve arrived at this auspicious moment. **I give thanks to the movement for immigrant rights in Texas.** It was these folks, grassroots organizers and affected families, progressive leaders and statewide organizations, who made Austin a national flashpoint in the struggle to resist hateful, anti-immigrant attacks, when we fought Texas Senate Bill 4 in 2017. This movement elected a local sheriff who opposed mass deportation policies, and it was this movement that gave me the opportunity to serve as the lawyer for the City of Austin, suing the State of Texas to stop SB4, alongside the biggest cities in Texas. Before Beto made big gains in the electoral context, the movement against SB4 unified progressive forces statewide, and showed how powerful we can be. **I give thanks to the Indivisible movement.** I would never have run for Congress in 2018, but for all of the wonderful individuals who stepped up to resist Trump, and who were willing to fight against every official who enables his regime. TX-10 was supposed to be a “safe” Republican seat, but that didn’t stop dozens of Indivisible activists from knocking doors, making calls, writing postcards, and spreading the word. While national pundits and party leaders thought it was a waste of time, it was folks like Indivisible who put the work in, to make TX-10 a national battleground district. **I give thanks to all of the workers and unions who are fighting and winning big gains across Texas.** From airline workers and auto workers to teachers and even political campaign workers, new unions are forming and labor is winning across Texas. My own political career began with AFSCME Local 1624 here in Austin, and all the members who encouraged me to take on McCaul. The labor movement built the middle class in America, and it is the labor movement that will bring it back in the years to come. **I give thanks to the environmental movement, to the folks fighting the fossil fuel industry and resisting climate change.** I am inspired every day by the youth leaders who are building an international movement to save our planet, and by the activists who have kept the flame alive for decades, even in a hostile context here in Texas. We are building momentum to close polluting fossil fuel facilities, while envisioning an environmentally-sustainable future. **I give thanks to everyone fighting to protect our right to vote. Every day brings a new voter suppression tactic in Texas.** And every day finds a new champion to stand up for democracy. I have had the honor of standing alongside the students at Prairie View A&M, students, young Democrats and even 96-year old Democrats, all of whom are fighting hard to ensure that every person can vote. Like we say, Texas is not a red state, it’s a non-voting state, and it’s the movement to end voter suppression that will make transformative change possible. **I give thanks to every volunteer and donor who have made this campaign hum.** Thousands of you have donated, and over a thousand more have volunteered. We know that the incumbent has personal wealth and corporate cash, but he can’t buy people. And it’s you who will get to show the nation, that Texas 10—the district of LBJ and JJ Pickle before it was a “red” seat—will be a progressive seat once again. **And most of all, thank you to my family, who have supported me through this.** In particular, my wife Hindatu, who two years ago joined me in starting this work, to fight Trump and McCaul and the forces of hatred and division, and who has continued to support me as I quit my job this past February and devoted myself full-time to winning this seat. Hindatu and our children are why I fight, and why I can fight alongside you. Thank you for everything you do to make this a better world. We send our love and prayers, our solidarity, and our commitment to continuing this work for political change in Texas. Together we will win! Love and respect,
Mike Siegel
* * *
**[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12319119/126583231/-1950142826?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThkZjVlMi0wNDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3sd1PAct2PRySSL-oWOdTbrXJxAVwTzFqFP51qhyTM=&emci=bd8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=be8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172) [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12319120/126583232/862725720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThkZjVlMi0wNDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3sd1PAct2PRySSL-oWOdTbrXJxAVwTzFqFP51qhyTM=&emci=bd8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=be8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172) [Campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12319121/126583233/-1686464446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThkZjVlMi0wNDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3sd1PAct2PRySSL-oWOdTbrXJxAVwTzFqFP51qhyTM=&emci=bd8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=be8df5e2-0412-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)** [ Donate Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12319122/126583234/203122784?refcode=embutton&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThkZjVlMi0wNDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3sd1PAct2PRySSL-oWOdTbrXJxAVwTzFqFP51qhyTM=)

name: Jason Yates
subject: A Thanksgiving message for you, Peter
body:
| | Peter, You are one of the reasons I’m thankful today and I can tell you that our entire team is grateful you are a part of My Faith Votes. Take a few minutes to [watch this brief Thanksgiving message](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFhslV4ZhjUejBSi2IjyO_67d9YjLnN3JBHNssFBuG0btA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191128com01&n=1) I recorded for you. There is a timeless truth from the first Thanksgiving that resonated with me as I reflected on this season. May it be an encouragement to you and your family as well. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFhslV4ZhjUejBSi2IjyO_67d9YjLnN3JBHNssFBuG0btA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191128com01&n=2) From all of us at My Faith Votes, we pray God’s blessings on you this Thanksgiving. It’s an honor to stand shoulder to shoulder with you to advance the values of our faith in this nation and encourage Christians to vote in every election. _Happy Thanksgiving!_ Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191128com01&n=3)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

Taking a step back to reflect on all I'm thankful for is always my favorite part of this holiday. I'm more grateful than ever to have your support, and I know we'll be ready to take on any challenges ahead.

As our communities continue to recover and rebuild after last month's devastating fires, it's a great time to gather together and focus on what's important, and to reflect on how far we've come. I'm thankful for the spirit of community that helped us through this hard time. I hope you have a joyful Thanksgiving, and you're able to spend time with the people you love.

Thanks,

Mike [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oNAIsRVCgrYahYeRZ1sQjd0uZWrClCehsnKtfMwAGBQ=/VU1kwvVAewtw-Ng-93HHY5rC6ZrY6VRjkfIC8m3UJr4=)
* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: What I'm grateful for
body:
I hope you have a Happy Thanksgiving | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/110fe2bbc0fd/calling-all-patriots-12075849?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9519ecbd3b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=69f98d2cae&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving today!

This time of the year always fills me with gratitude as I reflect on how blessed I am to have a growing and happy family by my side. I hope you get to enjoy a home-cooked meal with loved ones and take a moment to thank God for our many blessings, including living in the greatest country in the world.

No one summed it up better than Abraham Lincoln, who said the following in his Thanksgiving Proclamation:

"I do therefore invite my fellow citizens in every part of the United States, and also those who are at sea and those who are sojourning in foreign lands, to set apart and observe the last Thursday of November next, as a day of Thanksgiving and Praise to our beneficent Father who dwelleth in the Heavens. And I recommend to them that while offering up the ascriptions justly due to Him for such singular deliverances and blessings, they do also, with humble penitence for our national perverseness and disobedience, commend to His tender care all those who have become widows, orphans, mourners or sufferers in the lamentable civil strife in which we are unavoidably engaged, and fervently implore the interposition of the Almighty Hand to heal the wounds of the nation and to restore it as soon as may be consistent with the Divine purposes to the full enjoyment of peace, harmony, tranquility and Union."
---
| We Oklahomans are blessed with a thriving state, a kind people, and abundant resources. Every year so many people in our state sacrifice for the sake of others, especially the countless veterans and active duty military that call Oklahoma home. Let’s keep them and all those who sacrifice for our country in our prayers.

I'm truly grateful for this state and your friendship this Thanksgiving.

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ca4ed975a4&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Abundant blessings
body:
I'm beyond grateful on this day. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523917?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=015ccc70d7&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=65c6bc4bde&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter,

**"Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good." --Psalm 136**

You can imagine from the picture above that when you have a large family like ours, holidays are always a party. So this Thanksgiving, our hearts are especially filled with joy and gratitude as we gather with our wonderful family.

We laugh, we joke, we play games, and yes like most Americans, we eat a huge, delicious meal. Smelling that wonderful food and hearing the kids and grandkids play is very special.

We're also reminded today that all of us in Iowa and throughout the country are blessed beyond measure to live in America.

Thanksgiving is a celebration of what makes this country so exceptional. The vision of our Founders carries on today through all those who love freedom, and we must preserve that spirit.

I'm grateful today that we live in the greatest, freest, and most prosperous country on the face of the Earth. And I want to give special thanks and ask that you pray for the countless veterans and active-duty military members who call Iowa home. Their sacrifice allows us the plenty we enjoy.

Have a joyful day, filled with food, family, and fun. And may God continue to bless America.

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=7158d0a484&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling

Peter -- As we prepare to celebrate Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a minute to thank you for your support and friendship. I am thankful every day for the opportunity to serve the people of Ohio, and it is an honor to represent you in the United States Senate. I continue to fight for Ohio, working to help our economy, combat the addiction crisis, and improve our workforce development programs. I know that I wouldn’t be able to do it without the support and prayers from people like you. I hope you and your family have a wonderful Thanksgiving, and I hope to see you soon. name: Monika Johnson-Hostler
subject: A day to honor and reflect.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today we give thanks and honor Native and Indigenous people.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d916/7dfbb003/42ae5b4e/5527bec8/3764287364/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191128_em_honorandthanks&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191128_em_honorandthanks&source=rtw_20191128_em_honorandthanks")
---
Friend,

Today we approach the season of Thanksgiving. It is often a time many prepare to spend time with family and give thanks for the harvest, and I hope you take a moment to reflect on what you give thanks for today.

But as we give thanks, we must remember that November is Native American Heritage Month. **We should also reflect and pay tribute to the culture and history of the over 30 known tribes in North Carolina, whose land we live on.**

There are at least 12,000 years of Native history in our state. To ignore that history is to ignore the 184,000 Native people who call North Carolina home.

So yes--this is the season of gratitude. But this year, consider joining me in spending time with those we love as well as reflecting and honoring the voices and history of Native people.

My husband, Bobby, began his teaching career in Scotland County, and it was a wonderful experience living in a community rich with North Carolina Native American culture.

This year, Bobby and I plan to share and reflect on the time we shared with Lumbee students, and families we had the opportunity to get to know when we lived in Scotland County.

The Lumbee Tribe is the largest state tribe in North Carolina. It is also the largest state tribe east of the Mississippi River, and the ninth largest non-federally recognized tribe in the United States.

Wishing you a day of gratitude and reflection with your loved ones,

Monika
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d916/7dfbb003/42ae5b4e/5527bec9/3764287364/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191128_em_honorandthanks&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191128_em_honorandthanks&source=rtw_20191128_em_honorandthanks")
---

PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Giving Thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HERN FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
| Only in America, and only by the grace of God, are some stories possible.
---
Peter Willis , Only in America, and only by the grace of God, are some stories possible. My story is one of those. Only here, and only under the guiding hand of a truly higher power, could I hope to be where I am today, enjoying the privilege of serving as your Congressman. The blessings of freedom we enjoy as Americans gave me the opportunity and confidence to rise up, work hard, start businesses, employ others, and help other members of our community share in the blessings of freedom. Only here could it be possible for me, and only here has it been possible for millions of others. Today is a truly American holiday because it asks us to pause and remember all those who help us become who and what we are as citizens: strong, prosperous, and free... but also because it asks us to take a moment and recognize, as human beings, that all our striving is imperfect before the perfect example the Lord provides us. No matter how you spend today - and I pray you're able to do so in a place filled with the warmth of a loving family - and no matter the challenges you face in your lives, I also pray you're able to know much today for which you can truly feel thankful. I know I'm thankful to God for more than I can say. Not least among those things is, again, the honor of representing you in Congress. After today's pause, I'll return to the work of preserving our freedom, and continue to pray for the greatness of our country, her people, and all those who serve under the flag. I'm grateful to do so with your continued support. On behalf of my wife Tammy and all the Hern family, Happy Thanksgiving. -Kevin

Today is a truly American holiday because it asks us to pause and remember all those who help us become who and what we are as citizens: strong, prosperous, and free... but also because it asks us to take a moment and recognize, as human beings, that all our striving is imperfect before the perfect example the Lord provides us. No matter how you spend today - and I pray you're able to do so in a place filled with the warmth of a loving family - and no matter the challenges you face in your lives, I also pray you're able to know much today for which you can truly feel thankful. I know I'm thankful to God for more than I can say. Not least among those things is, again, the honor of representing you in Congress. After today's pause, I'll return to the work of preserving our freedom, and continue to pray for the greatness of our country, her people, and all those who serve under the flag. I'm grateful to do so with your continued support. On behalf of my wife Tammy and all the Hern family, Happy Thanksgiving. -Kevin * 8630 South Peoria Ave Tulsa, OK 74132 PAID FOR BY HERN FOR CONGRESS

------------------------------------------------------------
Bonnie and I wanted to take a second to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving. We hope you’re enjoying the day with family, friends, and loved ones.

I also hope you’ll join us in sending our best wishes to those who are spending today away from their loved ones because they are protecting us. Our service members, law enforcement officers, and first responders represent the best, and I mean the very best, our country has to offer.

Bonnie and I are thankful for the opportunity to serve the people of Georgia in the United States Senate. We’re also truly grateful for your prayers and support on this journey.

Thank you again for everything. Happy Thanksgiving.

God Bless,
David Perdue

name: Gary Peters
subject: thankful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Today is an opportunity for us to come together with family and loved ones to take stock of all that we have to be thankful for.
| | |
---
Today is an opportunity for us to come together with family and loved ones to take stock of all that we have to be thankful for.

I feel incredibly fortunate to be able to spend the holidays with my family. Time spent appreciating the company of those we hold dear will always be one of life's greatest privileges.

As a veteran and as the son of a World War II veteran, I'm reminded of the brave men and women who wear the uniform around the globe in service to our nation. Their sacrifices allow us to continue to live in a nation that values our freedom and safety above all else. Today and every day, we owe our service members, veterans, and their families a deep debt of gratitude.

Thanksgiving also serves as an important reminder that many Americans are still in need. Whether it's struggling to make ends meet, to afford necessary health care or to stay warm this winter, these families deserve to be in our thoughts. I remain committed to working towards a country whose prosperity is shared by all of us.

Lastly, I am thankful to have the privilege of continuing to represent Michigan in the United States Senate. I've lived in our wonderful state my whole life and am always proud to call it home.

I hope that each of you are enjoying time and good food with the special people in your life.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Gary

name: Mike Franken
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
With blizzards rolling through the Midwest, we are going to have a white Thanksgiving in Iowa. Whether stranded by weather or comfortably at home, I wish everyone could enjoy this unique Holiday. It i
|
---
| |
---

| | Happy Thanksgiving everyone: With blizzards rolling through the Midwest, we are going to have a white Thanksgiving in Iowa. Whether stranded by weather or comfortably at home, I wish everyone could enjoy this unique Holiday. It is a holiday event that few other nations can celebrate so joyously. There is a reason for that; America is unique in our topography, our plentiful natural resources, and our democratic institutions. But there are many among us who will not have a traditional Thanksgiving. Those people are either working a job, doing a duty for others, or performing a service. As a former sailor, I spent my share of Holidays at sea, serving in some distant outpost, or visiting those working in my commands in far-flung locations. It can be a lonely holiday season for some. I want to acknowledge the sacrifice of anyone who is in that situation today - whether it is to work your shift, ensure others have basic services, or to stand the watch - I salute you. With best wishes for a peaceful and prosperous Thanksgiving Day, Mike Franken, VADM USN (ret) |
---

| Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend -- Today reminds me that I have a lot to be grateful for. I'm grateful that I get to be your voice in this fight, I'm grateful for your trust in my vision, and I'm grateful for what we've achieved on this campaign so far. I hope you know I don't take a moment of it for granted. **Gratitude isn 't something that just happens -- it's something we have to practice. **I know it can feel difficult for many to feel grateful today, given the brutal history of this holiday, and how many continue to suffer injustice in this country. But I have so much faith in the future we're working toward. I know that, together, we can save the world. I hope you're spending today with your family, be it the one you were born into or one you choose for yourself. Happy Thanksgiving, from my home to yours. Time to cut the pie,
Tom _Steyer / Taylor family picture, 1997_
---
---
|
---

Time to cut the pie, Tom Steyer / Taylor family picture, 1997 | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking == — we’ll be sad to see you go! name: Cory Booker
subject: Grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I love the Thanksgiving season, friend. For me, it's a time filled with friends, family, and tofurky (yes, I spelled that correctly). A time to express gratitude for the many blessings in my life and to give back to those in need. It's also a time to take a break from the campaign trail to reflect on all the things I'm thankful for. This year, I'm excited to have my mom in New Jersey for the holiday. She makes the best cornbread stuffing -- a recipe passed down from my grandmother. And today, I want to make sure you know how grateful I am for you -- for your continued support of this campaign, for everything you do to help spread our message across the country, and for standing by our commitment to our shared values. We've had an incredible year, and I'm looking forward to everything we will accomplish in the one to come. I wish you and your family the happiest of Thanksgivings. Cory _P.S. Moms never stop being moms, even when their son is running for president._
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dda/5fca0d19/78902866/291ca7c1/3001671193/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dda/5fca0d19/78902866/291ca7c0/3001671193/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dda/5fca0d19/78902866/291ca7cf/3001671193/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dda/5fca0d19/78902866/291ca7ce/3001671193/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

body:

Team, I’d like to take a moment to wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving.
https://zoelofgren.com/ [https://zoelofgren.com/]
It’s always a good idea to pause and reflect on the many blessings we have. In an era of seemingly constant negativity, I’m looking forward to spending today reflecting on how much we have to be thankful for.

I hope you have a safe and relaxing day with your family and friends.

Happy Thanksgiving.

Best,

Zoe Lofgren

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Polite Dinner Conversations.
body:
these discussion starters can get the conversation going about our campaign, and what's at stake in 2020 | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2QA/ni0YAA/t.2x3/tkNjG_vARE-2MWhJYqIXgQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCzBRYSquKB1M1ToxJ0ZbBKYDTanROdgSGDexbp6bkYzz8avumoIYbU8jJ6Bi3k4QmyJ7RkIOWgDnvhixGfDO1N1Q4rZCLxOfqmSapmTYvPfpq1z8-2F-2FM-2BmGQpIEvY1r0dERamOP-2Fw-2Bm1cSdnsOiL-2FjHAAR-2BVYTr3GLHbeDGEwi-2BfCRVNP6hCd0fzwLwUhFUF5i2uViqKNEsIpNEMEstiV0ZHy86sWs1NwkeKQdNaMTYV3vgg5USrRTLqbI6mwqItBzc-3D/wruU)
---
Dear Friend, Today I will be thinking of you with gratitude, reflecting on the [true history of this holiday](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2QA/ni0YAA/t.2x3/tkNjG_vARE-2MWhJYqIXgQ/h1/wnKVMwY0-2BahHDznx2XoybdcDBa8nCkYLYA-2BZ412-2BwmF2vn-2FAlgecsacvQJPi8EOUqg8aV8WJ70s1Mboy6skCGoKBbE-2FVuSWaKTUtH1c-2BayzA1xAJFKgAWSjNoABEq846MfnK1MCL-2BMZkDBMcgMEm8angkgz9-2BenVengeXx-2F61a3dM7QXQ4aqE6R3CbqziAwfBIIpdsYpfBVFkrXz-2FG7WZSyNbiyNCYVdIdsRzh0pV-2FWdp4agw56BQS9AhsRVngZMBh0oOh3rqEfUfSnAZut0PWt4mSc-2FY3ADufGUqMmYXn567LH-2FGl178iN-2FbMiT3Eyd5BI7kfnuN6mTqpqiDpa5-2FA-3D-3D/jrP_), and preparing for the work ahead of us. I'm running because 2020 must be a turning point towards racial, economic, and environmental justice, and we are the ones who must make that change happen. If you are gathering with friends and family today, these discussion starters could help you get the conversation going about our campaign, and what's at stake:
* **Home for the holidays - **Everyone deserves a safe stable place to live, but Eugene is now ranked #1 for the most unhoused people per capita in the country. Today my family will be gathering with an expected crowd of 2,500 - the largest ever - at the 31st annual Whittaker Community Dinner in Eugene. Housing is a nationwide problem that needs national leadership and action, and that is just one of the reasons I am running for Congress.
* **The food on our table** \- As we sit to enjoy our meal together, it is important to take a moment to show gratitude to the farm workers, most of them immigrants, who make our meals possible. Farmworkers are often working in some of the most grueling conditions, and dealing with the injustices of wage theft and abuses, family separation, and racial profiling. Immigrant workers deserve dignity and respect on the job, and Congress must act to change the laws to allow people who live, work, raise families, and pay taxes in the US to become full citizens.
* **A time for family** \- The holidays are a time for families to celebrate together, but right now, an entire generation of Americans are wondering if they will ever be able to afford to have a family of their own. With childcare costs higher than college tuition, wages stagnating, and student loans overwhelming graduates, it is time to take a stand to fight for an affordable future. As a mom of a 4 and 6 year old shouldering childcare costs and student debt, I understand. That is why I am running to win debt-free education, universal preK, and affordable childcare in every community.
* **In this season of giving** - I am the only candidate who is not accepting "gifts" from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry in this race. That's why I need your help to win in 2020. **[Spread the holiday cheer by chipping into our grassroots campaign!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2QA/ni0YAA/t.2x3/tkNjG_vARE-2MWhJYqIXgQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJD-2B3V-2FnWL-2BIDbBWvToF7J7mzVutb3CWKxWRmfIi5Jxu3pBiECxqxTHtG5RL7lGxTEBnHYAyw-2ByVv3DSGKjSJP3wKgXl9fe0sRNacEjHql68aATo57SMVkYrMLFlPffIpOMGjGbsIqPGhR1UCdIpUJbxoBSqEUR1MTluwTBJVCUdLRvvVawCDzF3cGKsftqbVqV2-2FxGXox-2BwFRDW-2BXiEu-2BLUxK-2BZbKtaaRmyhpfQ-2FvQnn25XBoD1GYy7-2BnrzjEbdJQ-3D/mrXk)**

---
[ **Donate Today!** ](?link_id=6&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-polite-dinner-conversations&email_referrer=email_672553___subject_876945&email_subject=polite-dinner-conversations)
---
Yours in gratitude, Doyle Canning
---
|
---
Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! [You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2QA/ni0YAA/t.2x3/tkNjG_vARE-2MWhJYqIXgQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJfvvN8qBuq7ZECa2iJJ-2FwvGbJPhyleJrnGTMr5NxKZ-2FQrJ3RxXOjCjB3Cu-2Fox6tGh5XFw-2Fsznl9DX1tqF0z59S7jOFunxXRyYdUduLqpVO94WUGbwkRZckg5ddpZL-2FQlbLaam716m1hu8OpoMCqU6VHLJt3QR4zXxbG-2F6kmRHcI97pOhmBfgyTNR4Vso1DZu1WnDZPTJrTl7JeeSkTPUMg51ILoMy5Q8RNkAZPxdcKZ3il-2BP-2BXFxRZeH3ydhO2lO4-3D/Lzdv "Donate to Doyle Canning")

clean_body: these discussion starters can get the conversation going about our campaign, and what's at stake in 2020 | | Dear Friend, Today I will be thinking of you with gratitude, reflecting on the , and preparing for the work ahead of us. I'm running because 2020 must be a turning point towards racial, economic, and environmental justice, and we are the ones who must make that change happen. If you are gathering with friends and family today, these discussion starters could help you get the conversation going about our campaign, and what's at stake: Home for the holidays - Everyone deserves a safe stable place to live, but Eugene is now ranked #1 for the most unhoused people per capita in the country. Today my family will be gathering with an expected crowd of 2,500 - the largest ever - at the 31st annual Whittaker Community Dinner in Eugene. Housing is a nationwide problem that needs national leadership and action, and that is just one of the reasons I am running for Congress. The food on our table \- As we sit to enjoy our meal together, it is important to take a moment to show gratitude to the farm workers, most of them immigrants, who make our meals possible. Farmworkers are often working in some of the most grueling conditions, and dealing with the injustices of wage theft and abuses, family separation, and racial profiling. Immigrant workers deserve dignity and respect on the job, and Congress must act to change the laws to allow people who live, work, raise families, and pay taxes in the US to become full citizens. A time for family \- The holidays are a time for families to celebrate together, but right now, an entire generation of Americans are wondering if they will ever be able to afford to have a family of their own. With childcare costs higher than college tuition, wages stagnating, and student loans overwhelming graduates, it is time to take a stand to fight for an affordable future. As a mom of a 4 and 6 year old shouldering childcare costs and student debt, I understand. That is why I am running to win debt-free education, universal preK, and affordable childcare in every community. In this season of giving - I am the only candidate who is not accepting "gifts" from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry in this race. That's why I need your help to win in 2020. ?linkid=6&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-polite-dinner-conversations&emailreferrer=email672553_subject876945&emailsubject=polite-dinner-conversations Yours in gratitude, Doyle Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Today especially, I am overwhelmed with gratitude. I’ll be spending the holiday with my grandmother today — as you probably know she helped raise me and encouraged me to chase any dream I had growing up. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2gA/ni0YAA/t.2x3/tC67l9fNQNewxE7tYnwTGQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH72aUBlsTdnULr9T5pRf7Mklpj0TrkCpXcQgAOiSHta5avvizs6gOtBWpm1M07I9mxqIw7HkgyXzj-2BUBGaFx8JgkWAk2gDS2pJ9FVt2vtn1bnCLyHekywT57tXMC7aT1OOFUdRbcUZqVGavz-2Fs1BHCfY3y9Kel5YYhH8FA2PzfFpKxY8NS96APtcWSA3jkMxxjjyz9uGe7OYzjzDgRQ0GNnPj4BE-2BZaCtZLGKUy1BmKgE-3D/Xv31)
Friend, I hope you’re having a restful and happy Thanksgiving. Today especially, I am overwhelmed with gratitude. I’m spending the holiday with my grandmother today. As you may know, she helped raise me and encouraged me to chase any dream I had growing up. I am forever grateful for her unconditional love and support. Thinking about how hard she worked for our family inspires me every day to work harder on the campaign trail. **I’m also thankful for you, friend.** Supporters like you are the heart and soul of this campaign. Together, we’re changing the face of politics and fighting for a bold, progressive agenda that will lift up every family in New York’s 17th Congressional District. We wouldn’t be able to do this without you.
I hope you have a great holiday. Enjoy it. name: Marsha and Chuck Blackburn
subject: Thanksgiving Blessings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marsha for Senate
body:
We won't cut into too much of your time with family and friends watching football, carving the turkey or whatever traditions you may celebrate today. We wanted to take some time to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving!

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Marsha for Senate, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDEyMTkwNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjU3MDUwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_" Oh, give thanks to the Lord, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever." _
-1 Chronicles 16:34

Dear Peter,

We won't cut into too much of your time with family and friends watching football, carving the turkey or whatever traditions you may celebrate today.

We wanted to take some time to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving! Today's holiday is often associated with symbols of unity and coming together to recognize the very many blessings we have in life. We give thanks to God for the blessings he has given us--there is so much to be thankful for this year. As we head into the holiday season, let us all pause and take a moment to reflect on how fortunate we are to be living in the greatest country on Earth as part of the greatest experiment of self-governance in history. We are incredibly blessed to live in a free society, where speech, thought and personal liberties are all protected.

Wishing you and yours a safe and happy holiday,

Marsha and Chuck Blackburn

Paid for by Marsha for Senate
---
This message reflects the opinions and representations of Marsha for Senate. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Marsha for Senate's online community.

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDEyMTkwNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjU3MDUwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Michael, Susan, and the girls
subject: Thankful for you all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team Bennet,

My family and I want to wish you a happy Thanksgiving!

We are so grateful for the support you've provided this campaign this year, and for many of you, throughout my career of service in the Senate as well.

We couldn't do this without you, and we are incredibly thankful.

We appreciate everyone who has given their time and talents to make this all possible. From door knocking in the freezing rain to hours of phone banking, we are building this movement one conversation at a time with a vision for the next generation.

Together, we can restore integrity to our government and build opportunity for all Americans.

So from my family to yours, thank you and have a great holiday season.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba981/134673f2/9d8f0a1/6997a7c6/1056590915/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
Michael, Susan, Caroline, Halina, and Anne

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Happy Thanksgiving (and a few tips!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
15 years in the restaurant business taught me a lot about restoring harmony and goodwill at a dinner table--a skill we might all find handy this Thanksgiving. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d304/4273201080/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, 15 years in the restaurant business taught me a lot about restoring harmony and goodwill at a dinner table--a skill we _might_ all find handy this Thanksgiving. If you're expecting skirmishes over turkey and stuffing today, here are a few tips from "the other side of the bar":
* Have extra stuffing whenever possible: A second serving does wonders to bring down rising tempers.
* Drink in moderation. One too many beers won't make you any more persuasive!
* Do some tactful redirection by reminding everyone how thankful we should be to live here in Colorado: 300 sunny days a year, mountain landscapes draped in snow, the birthplace of the cheeseburger (allegedly!)
* Keep asking everyone else how they are doing. Thanksgiving is a good time to find the little things you can do to help family and friends, often in ways wholly unexpected.

What I also learned in the restaurant biz is the surest way to calm down someone who feels angry or unheard at the dinner table is to repeat their words back to them. **All of us want to feel understood and acknowledged --something we need today more than ever.**

The fact is, in our state, the opinions are all over the map. We are ranchers and farmers, teachers and restaurateurs, tradespeople and geeks. We have one of the highest percentages of political independents of any state; Colorado is every shade of blue and red, and some parts are as purple as the Rockies.

**What holds us all together is this: Coloradans know how to listen. We know how to learn and evolve in pursuit of common goals.** That's how we managed to get health insurance for 94% of Coloradans. It's how we stood up for our climate and our children by passing some of the strongest methane and gun safety regulations in the country. We did that.

However your Thanksgiving goes, I want you to keep this in mind: **On the issues that affect us all, Colorado knows how to come together. And we will do it again in 2020 in order to push our democracy forward and give our state the representation it deserves in Washington.**

Today, I'm grateful for my family, for every team who's ever supported me on every campaign and every elected office I've held, every restaurant I've started, and every project I've dived into headfirst. And friend, I'm grateful for you.

There's nothing we can't accomplish together.

Happy Thanksgiving,

John
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191128_jh_20191128-fr-jh-thanks-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d303/4273201080/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d300/4273201080/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d301/4273201080/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d33e/4273201080/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d33f/4273201080/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d33c/4273201080/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771428/691c9bd/6f928777/11a7d302/4273201080/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Michael, Susan, and the girls
subject: Thankful for you all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team Bennet,

My family and I want to wish you a happy Thanksgiving!

We are so grateful for the support you've provided this campaign this year, and for many of you, throughout my career of service in the Senate as well.

We couldn't do this without you, and we are incredibly thankful.

We appreciate everyone who has given their time and talents to make this all possible. From door knocking in the freezing rain to hours of phone banking, we are building this movement one conversation at a time with a vision for the next generation.

Together, we can restore integrity to our government and build opportunity for all Americans.

So from my family to yours, thank you and have a great holiday season.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9bd/134673f2/9dbefb7/6997a7ee/4013910919/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112819_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
