name: Laura Loomer
subject: Understanding Thanksgiving
body:
On this Thanksgiving afternoon, I want to wish you and your family the very best.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354894-827477-4733277-4bb5e17e06-053a244a88)
Patriot,

On this Thanksgiving afternoon, I want to wish you and your family the very best.

I’m thankful for your support. I cannot say that enough.

In the world of politics, it’s too easy to get caught up on the differences we have with others . . . from our neighbors and friends, to our family members.

Taking a step back to fully see what we have to be thankful for in our nation, despite our differences, is paramount to civility.

Giving thanks is a process that places our prosperity, our health, our family and our faith at the forefront. It’s a day long commitment to appreciating the positivity in life – no matter how dire our situation.

There’s no better example of this than a simple act by one of our nation’s presidents.

In 1863, in the midst of the Civil War, President Lincoln made Thanksgiving an official, national holiday.

Think about that for a moment. During America’s most trying time, the President of the United States asked that one day a year, we set aside our differences and express gratitude for each other and the prosperity granted by God.

Here is President Lincoln’s Thanksgiving proclamation, and I hope you have a chance to give it a read and share it during this holiday:

> The year that is drawing towards its close, has been filled with the blessings of fruitful fields and healthful skies. To these bounties, which are so constantly enjoyed that we are prone to forget the source from which they come, others have been added, which are of so extraordinary a nature, that they cannot fail to penetrate and soften even the heart which is habitually insensible to the ever watchful providence of Almighty God. In the midst of a civil war of unequalled magnitude and severity, which has sometimes seemed to foreign States to invite and to provoke their aggression, peace has been preserved with all nations, order has been maintained, the laws have been respected and obeyed, and harmony has prevailed everywhere except in the theatre of military conflict; while that theatre has been greatly contracted by the advancing armies and navies of the Union. Needful diversions of wealth and of strength from the fields of peaceful industry to the national defence, have not arrested the plough, the shuttle, or the ship; the axe had enlarged the borders of our settlements, and the mines, as well of iron and coal as of the precious metals, have yielded even more abundantly than heretofore. Population has steadily increased, notwithstanding the waste that has been made in the camp, the siege and the battle-field; and the country, rejoicing in the consciousness of augmented strength and vigor, is permitted to expect continuance of years, with large increase of freedom. No human counsel hath devised nor hath any mortal hand worked out these great things. They are the gracious gifts of the Most High God, who, while dealing with us in anger for our sins, hath nevertheless remembered mercy.
>
> It has seemed to me fit and proper that they should be solemnly, reverently and gratefully acknowledged as with one heart and voice by the whole American people. I do therefore invite my fellow citizens in every part of the United States, and also those who are at sea and those who are sojourning in foreign lands, to set apart and observe the last Thursday of November next, as a day of Thanksgiving and Praise to our beneficent Father who dwelleth in the Heavens. And I recommend to them that while offering up the ascriptions justly due to Him for such singular deliverances and blessings, they do also, with humble penitence for our national perverseness and disobedience, commend to his tender care all those who have become widows, orphans, mourners or sufferers in the lamentable civil strife in which we are unavoidably engaged, and fervently implore the interposition of the Almighty Hand to heal the wounds of the nation and to restore it as soon as may be consistent with the Divine purposes to the full enjoyment of peace, harmony, tranquility and Union. In testimony whereof, I have hereunto set my hand, and caused the seal of the United States to be affixed.
>
> Done at the city of Washington, this third day of October, in the year of our Lord one thousand eight hundred and sixty-three, and of the independence of the United States the eighty-eighth."
>
> _Proclamation of President Abraham Lincoln_ , October 3, 1863.
Thank you again for all that you do and Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

Population has steadily increased, notwithstanding the waste that has been made in the camp, the siege and the battle-field; and the country, rejoicing in the consciousness of augmented strength and vigor, is permitted to expect continuance of years, with large increase of freedom. No human counsel hath devised nor hath any mortal hand worked out these great things. They are the gracious gifts of the Most High God, who, while dealing with us in anger for our sins, hath nevertheless remembered mercy. It has seemed to me fit and proper that they should be solemnly, reverently and gratefully acknowledged as with one heart and voice by the whole American people. I do therefore invite my fellow citizens in every part of the United States, and also those who are at sea and those who are sojourning in foreign lands, to set apart and observe the last Thursday of November next, as a day of Thanksgiving and Praise to our beneficent Father who dwelleth in the Heavens. And I recommend to them that while offering up the ascriptions justly due to Him for such singular deliverances and blessings, they do also, with humble penitence for our national perverseness and disobedience, commend to his tender care all those who have become widows, orphans, mourners or sufferers in the lamentable civil strife in which we are unavoidably engaged, and fervently implore the interposition of the Almighty Hand to heal the wounds of the nation and to restore it as soon as may be consistent with the Divine purposes to the full enjoyment of peace, harmony, tranquility and Union. In testimony whereof, I have hereunto set my hand, and caused the seal of the United States to be affixed. Done at the city of Washington, this third day of October, in the year of our Lord one thousand eight hundred and sixty-three, and of the independence of the United States the eighty-eighth." Proclamation of President Abraham Lincoln , October 3, 1863. Thank you again for all that you do and Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours. Respectfully, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, from our family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e8/3eb3e2fc/685ff5a0/744d5fee/1178252862/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving&source=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving")
---
| | We have so many blessings to celebrate this Thanksgiving. Like you, I'm grateful for the gift of family. After many months on the campaign trail, I'm thankful to be at home with my wife, Erica, and our two wonderful children, Carina and Cristian. Today we participated in a San Antonio tradition by volunteering at the Raul Jimenez Thanksgiving Dinner, serving hot turkey meals to thousands of seniors and folks in need. | []()
---

My thoughts are also with the men and women of the Armed Forces in bases around the world who are defending our freedom and serving our country.

I'm also grateful for all of YOU.

This campaign has been an unlikely journey from the start, and the outpouring of support and the groundswell of contributions has been tremendous.

You give me hope. I'm grateful not just for your belief in me, but in the future we believe is possible.

Yesterday I released my [People First Plan to End Hunger in America](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e8/3eb3e2fc/685ff5a0/744d5fed/1178252862/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://bit.ly/jcEndingHunger?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+People+First+Plan+to+End+Hunger+in+Ameri&utm_campaign=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving&source=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving"). I believe that this generation can defeat malnutrition and achieve freedom from hunger.

I've been bold in this campaign. I've been fearless in fighting for underserved communities and standing up for vulnerable people.

And thanks to your support, I won't stop.

Have a Happy Thanksgiving, y'all!

With gratitude,
Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e8/3eb3e2fc/685ff5a0/744d5fec/1178252862/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving&source=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving")

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e8/3eb3e2fc/685ff5a0/744d5fe9/1178252862/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving&source=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e8/3eb3e2fc/685ff5a0/744d5fe8/1178252862/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving&source=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e8/3eb3e2fc/685ff5a0/744d5fd7/1178252862/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving&source=20191128_em_castro_all_thanksgiving"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: a day full of thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|
---
| | Hi there,

Before you sit down for Thanksgiving dinner, I wanted to send you a quick note about gratitude.

In New Mexico, we have a lot to be thankful for -- from the rich fields that produce our famous green chile to the warm communities that welcome new friends and old ones.

Over the past few years, I've realized how strong our communities are -- not just here in New Mexico, but all across America. As divisiveness and hatred have reared their ugly heads, millions of Americans have quietly stood up and said: "**That 's not who we are**."

I know that news from Washington has seemed dark over the last few weeks -- but our country has faced tough times like these before, and we have always emerged stronger.

America is full of compassionate, kind people, and our future is bright.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family!

Ben Ray Lujan
---
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7ef/18e32a7f/5014cf01/7b22d5a6/1920838503/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7ef/18e32a7f/5014cf01/7b22d5a7/1920838503/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7ef/18e32a7f/5014cf01/7b22d5a4/1920838503/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7ef/18e32a7f/5014cf01/7b22d5a5/1920838503/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7ef/18e32a7f/5014cf01/7b22d45a/1920838503/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7ef/18e32a7f/5014cf01/7b22d45b/1920838503/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Tina Smith
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I couldn't resist sending you a quick note to share my gratitude for you this Thanksgiving. I hope you will take a second to read it.

| Friend --

Today, we give thanks for the loved ones who surround us, the memories we've made in the past year, and (in my case) my grandmother's delicious lemon meringue pie recipe.

It's a day best spent enjoying the fellowship and good times shared with your family and friends. But I couldn't resist sending you a quick note to share my gratitude for you this Thanksgiving.

**I count you as one of the many things I'm thankful for in my life.**

Whatever form your Thanksgiving takes -- whether it's a small gathering of friends, a big family get-together, or strangers coming together over a shared table -- I hope it finds you well and I wish you all the best.

Sincerely and in thanks,

Tina
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). Happy Thanksgiving!

We hope that wherever you are, the food is good and you're ready for some big, structural turkey (or tofurky!).

Thanksgiving is a time with people you don't see very often -- and sometimes it makes for a tough political conversation.

But Thanksgiving is also a golden opportunity to win over new supporters or keep track of people in your life who are already on Team Warren. **That's why we wanted to let you know about _Reach_ -- a grassroots canvassing app where you can help Team Warren contact current and potential supporters and grow our movement.**

**[Click here to create a _Reach_ account -- and get ready for Thanksgiving with a plan!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b5ea/45c30650/119275289/66f97746/791248422/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://reach.elizabethwarren.com")

Use code _22W9DU_ when prompted to get started.**

And here are a few ways you can make the case for Elizabeth while staying festive:

**Team Warren Thanksgiving Conversation Starters**
* Everyone should do their fair share -- bring a dish, set the table, clean up, or for any billionaires at your table, pay a two-cent Ultra-Millionaire Tax.
* While watching some football, talk about the importance of a level playing field -- for our family farmers, and for the hometown team.
* 1% of the family shouldn't get 99% of the pie. We're done with an economy that only works for a thinner and thinner slice at the top, and we don't want thin slices of pie, either.
* Have fun watching a Thanksgiving parade, and take a minute to laugh at the parade of billionaires who think they can buy this election.
* And, it's the perfect time to talk about rooting out Washington corruption over some root vegetables.

We're thankful to have you on this team today and every day. The time for small ideas -- and small plates -- is over, and we're grateful down to our (pota)toes for the grassroots movement we're building together.

**[If you're ready to keep talking about Elizabeth and her plans, click here to create an account on _Reach_. With _Reach_ , we can grow this movement by meeting people where they are -- on the couch, in the kitchen, with our neighbors, and in every community.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b5ea/45c30650/119275289/66f97746/791248422/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://reach.elizabethwarren.com")

You can use the special code _22W9DU_ when prompted to get started.**

Thanks again for everything you do, and wishing you a warm and happy Thanksgiving!

Team Warren

P.S. Want to learn more about how to use _Reach_? **[Sign up for a training to learn everything you need to know about using _Reach_ in your everyday life.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b5ea/45c30650/119275289/66f977e0/791248422/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://events.elizabethwarren.com/event/158247/?utm_source=email-20191128-thanksgiving")**

That's why we wanted to let you know about Reach -- a grassroots canvassing app where you can help Team Warren contact current and potential supporters and grow our movement. "" Use code 22W9DU when prompted to get started. And here are a few ways you can make the case for Elizabeth while staying festive: Team Warren Thanksgiving Conversation Starters Everyone should do their fair share -- bring a dish, set the table, clean up, or for any billionaires at your table, pay a two-cent Ultra-Millionaire Tax. While watching some football, talk about the importance of a level playing field -- for our family farmers, and for the hometown team. 1% of the family shouldn't get 99% of the pie. We're done with an economy that only works for a thinner and thinner slice at the top, and we don't want thin slices of pie, either. Have fun watching a Thanksgiving parade, and take a minute to laugh at the parade of billionaires who think they can buy this election. And, it's the perfect time to talk about rooting out Washington corruption over some root vegetables. We're thankful to have you on this team today and every day. The time for small ideas -- and small plates -- is over, and we're grateful down to our (pota)toes for the grassroots movement we're building together. "" You can use the special code 22W9DU when prompted to get started. Thanks again for everything you do, and wishing you a warm and happy Thanksgiving! Team Warren P.S. Want to learn more about how to use Reach? "" | Elizabeth doesn't accept contributions from PACs of any kind or federally registered lobbyists. This grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you. Chip in now to help build our movement.** | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Wendy Davis
subject: What I'm truly grateful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress](https://go
body:
---
| | Y'all, Today, I'm grateful for my daughters, Amber and Dru. For my beautiful grandchildren, Ellis and Sawyer. For my husband, Alan and our goofy, lovable labrador, Ziggy. I am grateful for the fact that we will gather today in a warm home, secure in the benefits that affordable education and good healthcare have made possible for us.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Y'all, Today, I'm grateful for my daughters, Amber and Dru. For my beautiful grandchildren, Ellis and Sawyer. For my husband, Alan and our goofy, lovable labrador, Ziggy. I am grateful for the fact that we will gather today in a warm home, secure in the benefits that affordable education and good healthcare have made possible for us. [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_noveom?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191128_Thanksgiving_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191128_Thanksgiving_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191128_Thanksgiving_U1_X1") **I 'm fighting for people across Texas and across the country who need that same security. And that begins by assuring that people have access to good paying jobs, that every person has access to healthcare, that higher education is affordable for all who want it, that our kids go to good and safe schools, and that we can securely retire after a life-time of hard work.** **That 's why I'm endlessly grateful for you, on this day and every day.** Thanks to you and your support, our campaign has been able to show the entire nation the strength of our people-powered movement. So as we celebrate with our loved ones and give thanks for the blessings in our lives, let us also be reminded of all that we can accomplish when we make the choice to show up and use our voices to stand for what's right, _together._ **We can fight to lift up the voices of the millions of Americans who have been ignored, whose stories aren 't being told** \-- parents who can't afford to pay the bills while working two jobs; students preparing for a mass shooting in a place they should feel and be safe; women forced to take desperate measures to get the health care they need; and those facing catastrophic healthcare costs that have pushed them to bankruptcy. **We can take this seat back from moneyed interests and restore power to the _people_.** Let's work to make sure that next year is one where ALL families can count the blessings that so many of us currently claim. I'm in this for THEM. I know you are, too. Much love, Wendy | | | [Donate >>](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_noveom?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191128_Thanksgiving_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=2+-+Donate+gtgt&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191128_Thanksgiving_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191128_Thanksgiving_U1_X1")

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Hot, cheesy awesomeness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
I wanted to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving and share my favorite recipe with you.
|
---

| | **Happy Thanksgiving, friends.** In our family, we each have a role today. I am in charge of making the pumpkin pie, cheese dreams, and corn pudding. I also help my mom with the turkey and stuffing. But my all-time favorite Thanksgiving cooking duty is making the Schmid Family Tiropites. Tiropites are phyllo dough pastry basted in butter with a spoonful of four-cheese mixture. You fold them back and forth like a flag and put them in the oven for 15 minutes. When you take them out, they are hot, cheesy awesomeness. They always go fast. So, if you are the one baking them, you have to save a few for yourself because they will all be gone. The recipe for tiropites comes from my nana. When we were little, she would tell us her recipes as we scribbled them down. We put the recipes into family cookbooks and albums, and we bring them out every year. To me, making tiropites symbolizes the start of the holiday season. We make dozens to last from Thanksgiving to Christmas and all the way to New Year's Day. This year, Thanksgiving is a little different. But no matter where we are or what is happening in our lives, I am so grateful for my family and our holiday traditions. So, from my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving! Stephanie |
#### _**Schmid Family Tiropites (makes 4 dozen)**_
_Ingredients_
* 12 oz cottage cheese
* 8 oz cream cheese
* 2 cups shredded cheddar cheese
* 2 cups grated parmesan cheese
* 3 eggs slightly beaten
* 1 package phyllo dough
* Lots (lots!) of melted butter

_Instructions_
* Combine the four cheeses and eggs in a 3-quart pot. Heat on low flame until all the cheese is melted together.
* Follow directions on package for handling phyllo dough. Take out one sheet at a time, brush with melted butter, and cut into one-inch wide strips.
* Spoon one teaspoon of cheese mixture onto a strip of dough. Fold like a flag; place on a cookie sheet, and freeze. (After the triangles have been frozen, they can be placed in a freezer bag for up to 3 months.)
* Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes, or until they are slightly brown at the edges.

---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Happy Thanksgiving 🍁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Tom, Meg, Ben, and I have a lot to be thankful for this Thanksgiving. We're fortunate to have our family, our friends, our state, our country, and much more.
The four of us look forward to joining our extended family later today, and I hope that you'll be able to share the holiday with those close to you too.
But before we sit down for turkey, stuffing, and pumpkin pie, it's more important than ever that we lend a hand where we're able and lift one another up. One way to do that is by supporting the New Hampshire Food Bank.
If you have a little extra to spare, please donate what you can so that others can enjoy a warm meal: [**https://www.nhfoodbank.org/donation-hub/**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30a/2a380d31/3d1c0d7c/f0e7c0/625397399/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://www.nhfoodbank.org/donation-hub/")
Wishing you and yours a very happy Thanksgiving.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
>

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30a/2a380d31/3d1c0d7c/f0e7c1/625397399/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

clean_body: | | | | Friend— I hope you’re having a wonderful Thanksgiving, and are able to take some time to reflect on what makes you feel grateful today. Today I’m feeling incredibly grateful for so many things, and on the top of that list is you. It’s because of you, friend, that we’ve now reached the 200,000 individual donor qualification for the December debate. Thank you. This campaign milestone represents so much more than an arbitrary DNC requirement for a presidential debate. It represents the continued strength and momentum of our grassroots movement to usher in a 21st century of peace, human dignity and true equality. Thank you. Today, I’m reflecting on how grateful and inspired I am by what we’ve already achieved together — and how hopeful I am for all that’s ahead. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890998/7f51f7bc/4ba98832/4ef088cc/3482290655/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Happy Thanksgiving! I've been taking some time this morning to reflect on what I'm grateful for, and I wanted to share those thoughts with you. I know many folks are busy cooking, watching football, running a Turkey Trot, or spending time with family, so I won't take too much of your time here -- but here is my list:
* I'm grateful to watch my boys grow up, and that they're still small enough to ask for bedtime stories at night
* I'm grateful for my loving and supportive spouse, Brandon, who keeps everyone laughing (and makes a mean steak!)
* I'm grateful for the health of my mom and that she lives close by

And this year, I'm especially grateful for each and every one of you who is fighting beside me for the future of our state and our country. It is my great honor to wake up every day and be a part of this team of passionate, engaged, thoughtful folks -- like you -- working towards a safer, healthier, fairer world to give to our children.

**[Would you let me know what you're grateful for?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890998/7f51f7bc/4ba98832/4ef088c3/3482290655/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mjh-grateful")**

With thanks,

\-- MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890998/7f51f7bc/4ba98832/4ef088c2/3482290655/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191128d__566__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
